statusLine.command: jq -r 'def bar(p): (((p // 0) / 10) | floor | if . > 10 then 10 elif . < 0 then 0 else . end) as $f | "\u001b[38;5;117m" + (("▬" * $f) // "") + "\u001b[38;5;241m" + (("▬" * (10 - $f)) // "") + "\u001b[0m"; (.model.display_name // "?") as $m | ((.context_window.used_percentage // 0) | floor) as $c | .rate_limits.five_hour as $fh | .rate_limits.seven_day as $sd | "\($m) | ctx \(bar($c)) \($c)%" + (if $fh then ($fh.used_percentage | floor) as $p | " | 5h \(bar($p)) \($p)% resets \($fh.resets_at | strflocaltime("%H:%M"))" else "" end) + (if $sd then ($sd.used_percentage | floor) as $p | " | 7d \(bar($p)) \($p)% resets \($sd.resets_at | strflocaltime("%a %H:%M"))" else "" end)'
